label: continuousness
pattern: WhenTrue; ALL-times HAPPEN for unbounded, uninterrupted persistence
gloss: The quality of a process or condition that persists at all times, without cessation, interruption, or any terminal point.
notes: AST adequacy: lossy — ALL-times HAPPEN conveys the absence of cessation, interruption, and end, but cannot distinguish one persisting process or condition from occurrences recurring at every time.
